author: Marlo Stewart
authorTitle: Engineering Chief of Staff, Project & Strategic Program Leader
relationship: worked with mundi on the same team
quote: Mundi is an exceptional front-end developer who consistently delivers high-quality work. He combines strong technical skill with a great eye for user experience, communicates clearly, takes ownership, and is the kind of teammate any team would be lucky to have.

author: Nathan Logan
quote: Mundi is extremely talented, forward-thinking, and consistently pairs technology decisions with real business needs. As a leader, he is humble, hard-working, and leads by action. As a mentor, he is patient, wise, and a great communicator.

author: Robert Evans
quote: Mundi is one of the nicest engineers out there who is also amazingly smart, talented, and efficient.

author: Keisha Archuleta, MBA
quote: This is the person you want on your team. He possesses immense talent and a fantastic personality, and any company would be lucky to bring him in.

author: Corey Larson
quote: Mundi is one of the best developers I've had the privilege of working with. Any project he touches improves under his leadership.
